faqs.question: When does the 2026 World Cup start?
answer_points: June 11, 2026 with the opening match at Estadio Azteca in Mexico City
Tournament runs through July 19, 2026 (final at MetLife Stadium)
39 days of competition, 104 total matches

faqs.question: Where is the 2026 World Cup being held?
answer_points: USA (11 cities), Mexico (3 cities), and Canada (2 cities)
16 venues total across 3 countries
First tri-hosted World Cup in history

faqs.question: How many games are in the 2026 World Cup?
answer_points: 104 total matches (up from 64 in 2022)
48 group stage matches, 16 round of 32, 8 round of 16, 4 QFs, 2 SFs, final + 3rd place
Expanded from 32 to 48 teams

faqs.question: What channel is the World Cup on?
answer_points: Fox Sports (English) and Telemundo (Spanish) in the USA
Streaming on Peacock and Fox Sports app
Most games during US daytime hours due to hosting

faqs.question: What time do World Cup games kick off?
answer_points: Expect kick-offs between 11am-9pm ET for US venues
Mexico City games may start earlier
Exact times released closer to tournament

faqs.question: Which US cities are hosting World Cup matches?
answer_points: 11 US cities: New York/NJ, Los Angeles, Dallas, Miami, Houston, Atlanta, Seattle, San Francisco, Boston, Philadelphia
MetLife Stadium hosts the final

faqs.question: Can I bet on individual World Cup matches?
answer_points: Yes, all major US sportsbooks offer match betting
Markets include moneyline, spread, totals, props
Live in-play betting available during matches

faqs.question: What are the key dates for the 2026 World Cup?
answer_points: Opening: June 11 (Mexico City)
Group stage: June 11-28
Knockouts: June 29 - July 18
Final: July 19 (MetLife Stadium)

faqs.question: Where is the World Cup 2026 final?
answer_points: MetLife Stadium, East Rutherford, New Jersey
Capacity 82,500
Also hosted 2014 Super Bowl

faqs.question: How does the 48-team World Cup format work?
answer_points: 48 teams divided into 12 groups of 4
Top 2 from each group advance plus 8 best third-place teams
New Round of 32 before traditional Round of 16
104 total matches compared to 64 in previous format
